goal: Update all documentation to reflect: (1) gitdir mount is now './workspace/.git:/gitdir', (2) mcp-server .git shadow is now a tmpfs mount instead of /dev/null, (3) test-integration.sh (not "parent test.sh") runs CVE audits and Docker integration tests.

tasks.name: Update docs/CONTEXT.md mounts + security layer + test split
tasks.action:
Make three targeted replacements:
1. In 'Volume mounts on claude-server' table: change '| ../.git/modules/cluster/\<sub-repo\> | /gitdir | rw | Git data for add/commit |' → '| ./workspace/.git | /gitdir | rw | Git data for add/commit |'
2. In 'Volume mounts on mcp-server' table: change '| /dev/null | /workspace/.git | ro | Shadows .git — structural hook prevention |' → '| tmpfs | /workspace/.git | ro,size=0 | Shadows .git via tmpfs — structural hook prevention |'
3. In 'Core Security Principles': change '6. Git hook prevention — /dev/null shadow + separated gitdir + core.hooksPath=/dev/null' → '6. Git hook prevention — tmpfs shadow + separated gitdir + core.hooksPath=/dev/null'
4. In 'Test Suite' section: change '- **Parent test.sh** — security scans (need network for vuln DBs) + integration tests (need Docker)' → '- **test-integration.sh** — security scans (need network for vuln DBs) + integration tests (need Docker)'
tasks.verify: grep './workspace/.git' docs/CONTEXT.md && grep 'tmpfs' docs/CONTEXT.md && grep 'test-integration.sh' docs/CONTEXT.md | grep -v '#' && ! grep '/dev/null.*workspace.*git\|../.git/modules' docs/CONTEXT.md && ! grep 'Parent test.sh' docs/CONTEXT.md
tasks.done: All four replacements confirmed present and old strings absent in docs/CONTEXT.md.

tasks.name: Update docs/PLAN.md /dev/null shadow + parent test.sh references
tasks.action:
Make two targeted replacements:
1. In Phase 2 line: change '(/dev/null shadow, separated gitdir, core.hooksPath), baseline commit floor,' → '(tmpfs shadow, separated gitdir, core.hooksPath), baseline commit floor,'
2. In Phase 3 line: change 'parent test.sh = security scans + integration' → 'test-integration.sh = security scans + integration'
3. In Risk Register last row: change 'Security scans run in parent test.sh with network access' → 'Security scans run in test-integration.sh with network access'
tasks.verify: grep 'tmpfs shadow' docs/PLAN.md && grep 'test-integration.sh' docs/PLAN.md | grep -v '^#' && ! grep '/dev/null shadow' docs/PLAN.md && ! grep 'parent test.sh' docs/PLAN.md
tasks.done: All three replacements confirmed present and old strings absent in docs/PLAN.md.

tasks.name: Update cluster/agent/docs/CONTEXT.md /dev/null shadow reference
tasks.action:
In the 'Git Hook Prevention (3 layers)' section, replace:
'1. mcp-server: `/dev/null` shadow on `.git` — fileserver can't see git data'
with:
'1. mcp-server: `tmpfs` shadow on `.git` (ro, size=0) — fileserver can't see git data'
tasks.done: The /dev/null shadow reference in cluster/agent/docs/CONTEXT.md is replaced with tmpfs and old string is absent.

tasks.name: Update cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md /dev/null shadow + parent test.sh references
tasks.action:
Make two targeted replacements:
1. In Phase 2 line: change '3-layer git hook prevention (/dev/null shadow, separated gitdir, core.hooksPath)' → '3-layer git hook prevention (tmpfs shadow, separated gitdir, core.hooksPath)'
2. In Phase 3 line: change 'those run in parent test.sh with network' → 'those run in parent test-integration.sh with network'
tasks.verify: grep 'tmpfs shadow' cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md && grep 'test-integration.sh' cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md && ! grep '/dev/null shadow' cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md && ! grep 'parent test\.sh' cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md
tasks.done: Both replacements confirmed present and old strings absent in cluster/agent/docs/PLAN.md.
